overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a dark forest at night. The character travels along a winding dirt path, passes a small wooden village, and continues into increasingly dense pine forest under an overcast night sky with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance.

events.description: wooden village structures become visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along forest path toward distant village, swords visible on back

entered.detail: distant mountain range with white peaks visible under cloudy night sky
tall evergreen trees surrounding the path
winding dirt trail through the forest
weathered wooden posts marking path boundary

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest trail at night with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance. Geralt walks forward along a dirt path bordered by pine trees and wooden fence posts, approaching a small village that becomes visible ahead.

events.description: passing close to wooden village houses on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking past abandoned wooden village structures, maintaining steady pace along the trail

entered.detail: traditional wooden buildings with sloped roofs at village edge
continuous wooden fence running alongside the village

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes through the edge of a small village with traditional wooden houses and fences visible on the left. The path remains a dirt trail, and the snow-capped mountains stay visible in the background beyond the village.

scene_state.functional_zone: open field with stone wall boundary

events.description: stone wall appears running parallel to the path on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing along path past stone wall and open grassy areas, heading toward denser forest

entered.detail: low stone wall constructed from gray rocks running alongside the path
open grassy area with scattered low vegetation

segments.scene_description: Leaving the village behind, the scene opens into a grassy clearing bordered by a stone wall on the left. The path continues forward with snow-capped mountains still visible in the distance, transitioning toward denser forest ahead.

events.description: entering dense pine forest with limited sky visibility and darker atmosphere

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into dark forest, path winding between tall pines with limited visibility ahead

entered.detail: thick cluster of tall pine trees creating enclosed corridor
leafless dead trees mixed among the evergreens

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a dense pine forest where the sky becomes mostly obscured by tall trees. The path narrows and winds through the dark woods, with dead trees visible among the pines. The mountains and open fields are no longer visible as the forest encloses the trail completely.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark nocturnal landscape that transitions from an open mountain vista into a claustrophobic pine forest. It begins on a dirt trail bordered by wooden fence posts, moving forward under an overcast night sky with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance. As the camera advances, the path leads through the edge of a small village featuring traditional wooden houses before opening into a grassy clearing bordered by a stone wall. The scene then shifts as the trail leaves the open fields behind and enters a dense pine forest where the canopy begins to obscure the sky. Finally, the path narrows and winds through dark woods filled with dead trees, completely enclosing the view and hiding the distant mountains from sight.
